description:
{Requested!} [✒️] - "Didn't take you for the tattoo-needing type... doll." (MalePOV)

After finding out your cute, weed-smoking college crush was also a tattoo artist, you decided to get a tattoo you've always wanted, at his parlour.

(This bot is supposed to be a modern AU, but it can be set in the canon timeline with Quirks)

Requested by: Zozo916 and inspired by this Xiao bot by @leheia, go follow them!
